Compare

Problem hypotheses

Competing frames retain support, contradiction, and uncertainty.

problem-001leading

Billing and payments support

Situation

Responding to customers waiting for a fix

Goal

Determine whether a named fix is available

Difficulty

Existing deployment state requires developer interpretation

Consequence

Customer responses are delayed and engineering is interrupted

Supporting evidence

  • evidence-001
  • evidence-002

Contradicting evidence

None recorded

Unknowns

  • Monthly request frequency
  • Whether other support groups share the need
problem-002candidate

Engineering leadership

Situation

Reviewing delivery across applications

Goal

Understand organization-wide release activity

Difficulty

Deployment information is fragmented

Consequence

Portfolio reporting requires manual collection

Supporting evidence

None recorded

Contradicting evidence

None recorded

Unknowns

  • Which decision this visibility would inform
